title: Change management and rollback operating model

tuw_evidence.title: Change processing and rollback tabletop scaffold

commands.purpose: Verify change demo evidence slots, expected procedure order, and rollback tabletop scenario rows

notes: This is a tabletop scaffold only; no real change, CI, deployment, regression, rollback execution, or product-state write occurred.
LT-L6-W05-T02 remains open until a real owner-approved low-risk change is processed through the full procedure and a conducted rollback tabletop is recorded.
The scaffold preserves the required evidence classes and procedure order for later reconciliation.

blocked_claims: This record does not claim LT-L6-W05, LT-L6-W05-T01, or LT-L6-W05-T02 is complete.
This record does not execute CI, deploy, rollback, or process a real change.
This record does not grant production deployment or rollback authority.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
